sentence: 这座殿堂已有几百年的历史。
pinyin: Zhè zuò diàn táng yǐ yǒu jǐ bǎi nián de lì shǐ.
english: This palace hall has a history of several hundred years.

sentence: 春节前夕，快递人员非常紧缺。
pinyin: Chūnjié qiányè, kuàidì rényuán fēicháng jǐnquē.
english: Delivery workers are in very short supply on the eve of the Spring Festival.

sentence: 政策落实总是滞后于市场变化。
pinyin: Zhèngcè luòshí zǒng shì zhìhòu yú shìchǎng biànhuà.
english: Policy implementation always lags behind market changes.

sentence: 他们住的是一家五星级酒店。
pinyin: Tāmen zhù de shì yī jiā wǔ xīng jí jiǔdiàn.
english: They stayed at a five-star hotel.

sentence: 清明节，全家一起去公墓扫墓。
pinyin: Qīngmíng jié, quánjiā yīqǐ qù gōng mù sǎomù.
english: On Qingming Festival, the whole family went to the public cemetery to pay their respects.

sentence: 加班太晚，他只好点了份快餐。
pinyin: Jiābān tài wǎn, tā zhǐhǎo diǎnle fèn kuàicān.
english: He stayed so late at work that he had no choice but to order fast food.

sentence: 儿子今年第一次参加了夏令营。
pinyin: Érzi jīnnián dì yī cì cānjiā le xiàlìngyíng.
english: My son attended summer camp for the first time this year.

sentence: 考试时可以使用计算器吗？
pinyin: Kǎoshì shí kěyǐ shǐyòng jìsuànqì ma?
english: Are we allowed to use a calculator during the exam?

sentence: 老师让我们列出十个描述天气的形容词。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen lièchū shí gè miáoshù tiānqì de xíngróngcí.
english: The teacher asked us to list ten adjectives describing the weather.

sentence: 她看起来脸色苍白，可能是病了。
pinyin: Tā kàn qǐlái liǎnsè cāngbái, kěnéng shì bìng le.
english: She looks pale; she might be sick.

meaning: 1. far end; 2. remote end; 3. remote; 4. distant
sentence: 电缆的远端连接到路由器。
pinyin: Diànlǎn de yuǎnduān liánjiē dào lùyóuqì.
english: The far end of the cable connects to the router.

sentence: 这份统计数据显示销量增加了。
pinyin: Zhè fèn tǒngjì shùjù xiǎnshì xiāoliàng zēngjiā le.
english: This statistical data shows that sales have increased.

sentence: 她用天然染料给布料上色。
pinyin: Tā yòng tiānrán rǎnliào gěi bùliào shàngsè.
english: She used natural dye to color the fabric.

sentence: 警察出动阻止暴民破坏商店。
pinyin: Jǐngchá chūdòng zǔzhǐ bàomín pòhuài shāngdiàn.
english: Police were deployed to stop the mob from destroying shops.

sentence: 他们搬家是为了住在好的学区里。
pinyin: Tāmen bānjiā shì wèile zhù zài hǎo de xuéqū lǐ.
english: They moved so they could live in a good school district.

meaning: 1. promotion; 2. to promote; 3. to introduce and recommend
sentence: 他在会上推介了公司的新产品。
pinyin: Tā zài huì shàng tuījiè le gōngsī de xīn chǎnpǐn.
english: He introduced and recommended the company's new product at the meeting.

sentence: 乐队演奏了一首进行曲。
pinyin: Yuèduì yǎnzòu le yī shǒu jìnxíngqǔ.
english: The band played a march.

sentence: 总价是一百八，零头我就不收了。
pinyin: Zǒngjià shì yī bǎi bā, língtóu wǒ jiù bù shōu le.
english: The total is 180, I'll skip the small remainder.

meaning: 1. a second job; 2. supplementary way of making a living
sentence: 他白天上班，晚上兼营网店。
pinyin: Tā báitiān shàngbān, wǎnshang jiānyíng wǎngdiàn.
english: He works during the day and runs an online shop on the side at night.

sentence: 昨晚淋雨，今天有点伤风。
pinyin: Zuówǎn lín yǔ, jīntiān yǒudiǎn shāngfēng.
english: I got caught in the rain last night and caught a cold today.

sentence: 这本书的副标题比正标题更吸引人。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū de fù biāotí bǐ zhèng biāotí gèng xīyǐn rén.
english: The subtitle of this book is more eye-catching than the main title.

sentence: 医生说手淫是正常的生理行为。
pinyin: Yīshēng shuō shǒuyín shì zhèngcháng de shēnglǐ xíngwéi.
english: The doctor said masturbation is a normal physiological behavior.

sentence: 专家对比赛结果做了详细评述。
pinyin: Zhuānjiā duì bǐsài jiéguǒ zuò le xiángxì pínshù.
english: The expert gave a detailed commentary on the match results.

meaning: written summary of a meeting; minutes
sentence: 秘书整理好了会议纪要发给大家。
pinyin: Mìshū zhěnglǐ hǎo le huìyì jìyào fā gěi dàjiā.
english: The secretary organized the meeting minutes and sent them to everyone.

sentence: 她过年前去庙里算命。
pinyin: Tā guònián qián qù miào lǐ suànmìng.
english: She went to the temple to have her fortune told before the new year.

sentence: 路边那块广告牌太显眼了。
pinyin: Lùbiān nà kuài guǎnggàopái tài xiǎnyǎn le.
english: That billboard by the road is very eye-catching.

sentence: 大主教主持了这场婚礼。
pinyin: Dà zhǔjiào zhǔchí le zhè chǎng hūnlǐ.
english: The archbishop presided over the wedding ceremony.

sentence: 老师解释了这段话里的隐喻。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jiěshì le zhè duàn huà lǐ de yǐnyù.
english: The teacher explained the metaphor in this passage.

sentence: 她剪了几块方形的布。
pinyin: Tā jiǎn le jǐ kuài fāngxíng de bù.
english: She cut several square pieces of cloth.

sentence: 他戒烟是因为医生警告他肺癌风险高。
pinyin: Tā jièyān shì yīnwèi yīshēng jǐnggào tā fèiái fēngxiǎn gāo.
english: He quit smoking because the doctor warned him about his high risk of lung cancer.

meaning: 1. to be out of (political) office; 2. to be out of power
sentence: 这个党现在在野，失去了执政地位。
pinyin: Zhège dǎng xiànzài zàiyě, shīqù le zhízhèng dìwèi.
english: This party is now out of power, having lost its ruling position.

sentence: 孩子们在游戏里念咒语召唤宝物。
pinyin: Háizimen zài yóuxì lǐ niàn zhòuyǔ zhàohuàn bǎowù.
english: The kids chant spells in the game to summon treasures.

meaning: 1. dialectics; 2. dialectic or Socratic method of debate
sentence: 老师用辩证法的思路分析这个问题。
pinyin: Lǎoshī yòng biànzhèngfǎ de sīlù fēnxī zhège wèntí.
english: The teacher analyzed this problem using a dialectical approach.

meaning: 1. courtyard (surrounded by many buildings); 2. compound; 3. great ins
sentence: 小时候他们住在一个老大院里。
pinyin: Xiǎoshíhou tāmen zhù zài yīgè lǎo dàyuàn lǐ.
english: When they were young, they lived in an old courtyard compound.

sentence: 请预留一个小时来办手续。
pinyin: Qǐng yùliú yīgè xiǎoshí lái bàn shǒuxù.
english: Please set aside one hour to complete the procedures.

meaning: 1. population (of a species); 2. community (of animals or plants)
sentence: 这片森林里的种群数量在减少。
pinyin: Zhè piàn sēnlín lǐ de zhǒngqún shùliàng zài jiǎnshǎo.
english: The population of this species in the forest is declining.

meaning: 1. to come to realize; 2. to appreciate (feelings)
sentence: 旅行让她对生活有了新的感悟。
pinyin: Lǚxíng ràng tā duì shēnghuó yǒu le xīn de gǎnwù.
english: Traveling gave her new insights into life.

sentence: 奶奶唱了一首儿时的歌谣给我听。
pinyin: Nǎinai chàng le yī shǒu érshí de gēyáo gěi wǒ tīng.
english: Grandma sang me a childhood folk song.

meaning: 1. background (academic and work); 2. curriculum vitae; 3. résumé
sentence: 他的履历很丰富，做过很多不同的工作。
pinyin: Tā de lǚlì hěn fēngfù, zuò guò hěn duō bùtóng de gōngzuò.
english: His résumé is impressive; he has held many different jobs.

sentence: 远处传来了号角的声音。
pinyin: Yuǎnchù chuán lái le hàojiǎo de shēngyīn.
english: The sound of a bugle horn came from far away.

meaning: 1. to prostrate oneself; 2. to fall on one's knees; 3. to grovel
sentence: 他拜倒在她的裙下，苦苦追求。
pinyin: Tā bàidǎo zài tā de qún xià, kǔkǔ zhuīqiú.
english: He fell at her feet and pursued her desperately.

sentence: 她提着一个篮子去市场买菜。
pinyin: Tā tí zhe yīgè lánzi qù shìchǎng mǎi cài.
english: She carried a basket to the market to buy vegetables.

sentence: 她喜欢看韩国的综艺节目。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān kàn Hánguó de zōngyì jiémù.
english: She enjoys watching Korean variety shows.

sentence: 他不喜欢记者打扰他的私生活。
pinyin: Tā bù xǐhuān jìzhě dǎrǎo tā de sīshēnghuó.
english: He doesn't like reporters intruding on his private life.

sentence: 他的父亲上个月病逝，家人很悲痛。
pinyin: Tā de fùqīn shàng gè yuè bìngshì, jiārén hěn bēitòng.
english: His father passed away from illness last month, and the family is grief-stricken.

sentence: 棕色眼睛是显性遗传。
pinyin: Zōngsè yǎnjīng shì xiǎnxìng yíchuán.
english: Brown eyes are a dominant trait.

sentence: 他赤裸裸地撒谎，一点都不掩饰。
pinyin: Tā chìluǒluǒ de sāhuǎng, yīdiǎn dōu bù yǎnshì.
english: He lied blatantly without any attempt to hide it.

sentence: 绳子的张力不够，需要再拉紧一些。
pinyin: Shéngzi de zhānglì bùgòu, xūyào zài lājǐn yīxiē.
english: The tension on the rope isn't enough; it needs to be pulled tighter.

sentence: 智能手机的影响如今无处不在。
pinyin: Zhìnéng shǒujī de yǐngxiǎng rújīn wúchù bùzài.
english: The influence of smartphones is everywhere nowadays.

meaning: 1. to nurse one's health; 2. to recuperate; 3. to take care of; 4
sentence: 手术后要好好调理身体。
pinyin: Shǒushù hòu yào hǎohǎo tiáolǐ shēntǐ.
english: You need to properly nurse your health after surgery.
